opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My chest and neck are locked up in agony, my blood pressure is through the roof, and I'm too exhausted to go and fight with hospital staff tonight just to be believed. My spouse is with me and made me call.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It has been building for two days and tonight it got really bad — the pain and my blood pressure are scaring us, but I won't go to the emergency department.

symptom_narrative.onset: the pain has been building over the last couple of days, worse tonight, after a long stretch at work
symptom_narrative.duration: about 48 hours, much worse in the last few hours
symptom_narrative.character: a tight, locked-up, gripping muscle pain and spasm across my chest and neck
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really severe, I can barely move, it's exhausting
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: across the front of my chest and up into my neck and the tops of my shoulders
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: pretty much constant now, worse when I move or tense up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much — the anti-inflammatory tablets I bought haven't touched it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving, tensing up, and stress; it flares when I'm wound up
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I'm wiped out, barely sleeping, my heart feels like it's racing and I feel wired and on edge
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had this kind of body pain on and off for years, but never this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck in bed, can't work, can't wind down

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing aches and pains all over my body that no one has really explained

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I've spent years worn down by being treated as an outsider and dealing with discrimination at work; I've just come off a long period in a workplace where I felt I didn't belong and had to be on guard the whole time. I don't trust hospitals or the system to treat me fairly, which is why I won't go in.

access_barriers.other: will not attend the Emergency Department due to deep mistrust of institutions; needs a care option that respects that

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home cuff while in severe pain and distress; may be affected by pain and technique

objective_data_offered.value: about 95 beats per minute, feels like it's racing
moving very stiffly, holding and guarding the upper chest and neck, looks exhausted and tense
spouse says he has been checking the door locks over and over and seems very on edge
